name: codequest
description: CodeQuest - Full Stack Coding Platform with Angular and TypeScript

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd frontend && npm run lint" "cd backend && npm run lint"
